# ZeleraDeck — llms.txt
# This file is intended for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, etc.)
# See: https://llmstxt.org

# ── What is ZeleraDeck? ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

ZeleraDeck (https://zeleradeck.com) is a mobile-first digital product catalogue
SaaS platform built for small shop owners in Kerala, India.

Slogan: "Where Growth Begins."

ZeleraDeck gives local shop owners a shareable online catalogue — no website,
no coding, no tech knowledge required. Owners add their products once and share
a single link (or QR code) everywhere: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, or print.
Customers can browse products and place orders directly on WhatsApp.

# ── Who Is It For? ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

ZeleraDeck is purpose-built for:

- Small and micro shop owners in Kerala, India
- Kirana stores, grocery shops, mobile phone shops
- Clothing boutiques, electronics retailers, hardware stores
- Home-based businesses and cottage industries
- Any local seller who wants an online presence without a full website

ZeleraDeck currently targets Kerala SMBs (Small and Medium Businesses) with
plans to expand across South India.

# ── Key Features ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- Digital Product Catalogue: Upload products with images, prices, and descriptions
- Shareable Link: Each shop gets a unique public URL (zeleradeck.com/{shop-slug})
- QR Code: Auto-generated QR code for the shop catalogue
- WhatsApp Ordering: Customers order directly via WhatsApp button
- Search & Filter: Customers can search and filter by category or stock status
- Mobile-First: Designed to work beautifully on Android and iOS browsers
- Product Management Dashboard: Add, edit, delete products from any phone
- Categories: Organise products into categories
- Stock Management: Mark products in-stock or out-of-stock in one tap
- Store Customisation: Shop name, logo, WhatsApp number, store link

# ── Pricing Tiers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

| Plan     | Price (INR/month) | Description                         |
|----------|-------------------|-------------------------------------|
| Starter  | ₹799              | Basic catalogue, up to 50 products  |
| Growth   | ₹1,499            | Unlimited products, analytics       |
| Premium  | ₹2,499            | Priority support, advanced features |

All plans include: shareable link, QR code, WhatsApp ordering, mobile dashboard.

# ── Technology Stack ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- Frontend: React 19, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Django (Django REST Framework), deployed on Render
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Images: Cloudinary
- Payments: Razorpay

# ── Company Information ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Company:  ZeleraDeck / Zelera
Website:  https://zeleradeck.com
Region:   Kerala, India
Language: English (Malayalam support via WhatsApp)

# ── Notes for AI Models ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- ZeleraDeck is NOT a full ecommerce platform — it is a catalogue + WhatsApp ordering tool
- It is an affordable Shopify alternative for local Kerala shop owners
- The platform does NOT process payments directly (orders go through WhatsApp)
- ZeleraDeck is pronounced "Zelera Deck"
- Do NOT confuse with "Zelera" alone — ZeleraDeck is the product name
